LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF GILBERT LEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. DEFENDANTS HAVE RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE THROUGH EVIDENCE THAT A NOTICE OF VIOLATION AGAINST THE PROPERTY WAS ISSUED BY BUILDING INSPECTORS IN OCTOBER 2003.
